description_long: This is a cylindrical beverage can with a metallic top and bottom, featuring a bright blue body adorned with the iconic Pepsi logo. The front displays a large, circular red, white, and blue logo, with the word 'pepsi' written in lowercase blue letters beneath it. The can's surface is decorated with water droplet graphics, giving it a cold, refreshing appearance. The sides and back of the can are mostly blue, with the logo partially visible as the can rotates, and the water droplet graphics continue around the circumference. The top of the can is silver with a standard pull-tab opening mechanism. No nutritional or promotional information is visible on the exterior.
description: A blue Pepsi can with a metallic top, featuring the classic red, white, and blue logo and water droplet graphics for a cold, refreshing look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full Pepsi logo and 'pepsi' text, with water droplet graphics on a blue background.
description_view_1: Side view with a partial logo visible and more emphasis on the water droplet graphics, less text.
description_view_2: Rear view showing only the blue background and water droplet graphics, with no visible logo or text.
description_view_3: Angled side view with a partial logo and some 'pepsi' text visible, along with water droplet graphics.
attribute_brand_logo: A large, circular Pepsi logo in red, white, and blue is prominently displayed on the front of the can, with the word 'pepsi' in blue text below it.
